'''鈭歜-s-z''' ('''kabasaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unalias|unalias]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-s-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unalias|unalias]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-s-z
|-
! Lemma
| kabasaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibasaz|thibasaz]] || [[word:jibasaz|jibasaz]] || [[word:shibasaz|shibasaz]] || [[word:kibasaz|kibasaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubasaz|thuthubasaz]] || [[word:jujubasaz|jujubasaz]] || [[word:shushubasaz|shushubasaz]] || [[word:kukubasaz|kukubasaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubasaz|thubasaz]] || [[word:jubasaz|jubasaz]] || [[word:shubasaz|shubasaz]] || [[word:kubasaz|kubasaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubasaz|thubasaz]] || [[word:jubasaz|jubasaz]] || [[word:shubasaz|shubasaz]] || [[word:kubasaz|kubasaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebasaz|thebasaz]] || [[word:jebasaz|jebasaz]] || [[word:shebasaz|shebasaz]] || [[word:kebasaz|kebasaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobasaz|thothobasaz]] || [[word:jojobasaz|jojobasaz]] || [[word:shoshobasaz|shoshobasaz]] || [[word:kokobasaz|kokobasaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobasaz|thobasaz]] || [[word:jobasaz|jobasaz]] || [[word:shobasaz|shobasaz]] || [[word:kobasaz|kobasaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobasaz|thobasaz]] || [[word:jobasaz|jobasaz]] || [[word:shobasaz|shobasaz]] || [[word:kobasaz|kobasaz]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:basaz|basaz]] || [[word:basaz|basaz]] || [[word:basaz|basaz]] || [[word:basaz|basaz]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:basaz|basaz]] || [[word:basaz|basaz]] || [[word:basaz|basaz]] || [[word:basaz|basaz]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:basaz|basaz]] || [[word:basaz|basaz]] || [[word:basaz|basaz]] || [[word:basaz|basaz]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:basaz|basaz]] || [[word:basaz|basaz]] || [[word:basaz|basaz]] || [[word:basaz|basaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙basaz|th忙basaz]] || [[word:j忙basaz|j忙basaz]] || [[word:sh忙basaz|sh忙basaz]] || [[word:k忙basaz|k忙basaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabasaz|thathabasaz]] || [[word:jajabasaz|jajabasaz]] || [[word:shashabasaz|shashabasaz]] || [[word:kakabasaz|kakabasaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabasaz|thabasaz]] || [[word:jabasaz|jabasaz]] || [[word:shabasaz|shabasaz]] || [[word:kabasaz|kabasaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabasaz|thabasaz]] || [[word:jabasaz|jabasaz]] || [[word:shabasaz|shabasaz]] || [[word:kabasaz|kabasaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabasaz|shabasaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabasaz|goshabasaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabasaz|gokishabasaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabasazn眉|shabasazn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabasaznkn眉|goshabasaznkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabasazn眉|gokishabasazn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabasazsh毛|shabasazsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabasaznksh毛|goshabasaznksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabasazsh毛|gokishabasazsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabasazro|shabasazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabasaznkro|goshabasaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabasazro|gokishabasazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabasazmu|shabasazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabasaznkmu|goshabasaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabasazmu|gokishabasazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabasazsher|shabasazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabasaznksher|goshabasaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabasazsher|gokishabasazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabasazng|shabasazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabasaznkng|goshabasaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabasazng|gokishabasazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabasazya|shabasazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabasaznkya|goshabasaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabasazya|gokishabasazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabasazyam|shabasazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabasaznkyam|goshabasaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabasazyam|gokishabasazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabasazn眉sh毛|shabasazn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabasaznkn眉sh毛|goshabasaznkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabasazn眉sh毛|gokishabasazn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabasazn眉ro|shabasazn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabasaznkn眉ro|goshabasaznkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabasazn眉ro|gokishabasazn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabasazn眉mu|shabasazn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabasaznkn眉mu|goshabasaznkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabasazn眉mu|gokishabasazn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabasazsh毛n眉|shabasazsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabasaznksh毛n眉|goshabasaznksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabasazsh毛n眉|gokishabasazsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabasazsh毛ro|shabasazsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabasaznksh毛ro|goshabasaznksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabasazsh毛ro|gokishabasazsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabasazsh毛mu|shabasazsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabasaznksh毛mu|goshabasaznksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabasazsh毛mu|gokishabasazsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabasazron眉|shabasazron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabasaznkron眉|goshabasaznkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabasazron眉|gokishabasazron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabasazrosh毛|shabasazrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabasaznkrosh毛|goshabasaznkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabasazrosh毛|gokishabasazrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabasazromu|shabasazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabasaznkromu|goshabasaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabasazromu|gokishabasazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabasazmun眉|shabasazmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabasaznkmun眉|goshabasaznkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabasazmun眉|gokishabasazmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabasazmush毛|shabasazmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabasaznkmush毛|goshabasaznkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabasazmush毛|gokishabasazmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabasazmuro|shabasazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabasaznkmuro|goshabasaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabasazmuro|gokishabasazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
